news.t: Schwab Asset Management Announces ETF Share Splits
Schwab Asset Management Announces Index and Fund Name Changes to Its Fundamental Index ETF and Mutual Fund Family

holdings.infoBox: FNDA is an equity ETF with a total of 931 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lumentum Holdings stock at 0.96%, Amkor Technology at 0.57%, Coherent at 0.56%, MKS Inc. at 0.55%, and Viasat at 0.48%.

overview.description: The Schwab Fundamental U.S. Small Company ETF (FNDA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a fundamentally selected and weighted index of small US firms based on adjusted sales, retained operation cash flow, and dividends plus buybacks. FNDA was launched on Aug 15, 2013 and is issued by Charles Schwab.
infoTable: RAFI Fundamental High Liquidity US Small Index

data.text: WESTLAKE, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Schwab Asset Management®, the asset management arm of The Charles Schwab Corporation, today announced forward share splits on 20 Schwab ETFs. Forward ETF share splits...

data.title: How smart beta ETFs are outperforming the market this year
data.text: Smart beta ETFs are outsmarting the broader market so far in 2019. Charles Schwab's Tony Davidow explains how they work.
